edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:e2090ce6ba80
edges.original_sentence: Mean rates of Sphagnum productivity were greater in the experimental plot (65–86 g m -2 month-1) than in the reference plot (45–55 g m -2 month-1) for both hummock ( S. fuscum) and lawn (S. magellanicum) species, although not signiﬁcantly so, indicating that the transplant had no adverse effects onSphagnum health.

source_spans.text: Mean rates of Sphagnum productivity were greater in the experimental plot (65–86 g m -2 month-1) than in the reference plot (45–55 g m -2 month-1) for both hummock ( S. fuscum) and lawn (S. magellanicum) species, although not signiﬁcantly so, indicating that the transplant had no adverse effects onSphagnum health.

source_document.title: Assessment of an integrated peat-harvesting and reclamation method: peatland-atmosphere carbon fluxes and vegetation recovery

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:e2090ce6ba80
edges.original_sentence: The inundated soil conditions in the trial pit prevented the large carbon dioxide emissions that are characteristic of many harvested peatlands.

source_spans.text: The inundated soil conditions in the trial pit prevented the large carbon dioxide emissions that are characteristic of many harvested peatlands.

source_document.title: Assessment of an integrated peat-harvesting and reclamation method: peatland-atmosphere carbon fluxes and vegetation recovery

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:2f3a37e91e8a
edges.original_sentence: However, the anoxic soil conditions in the experimental plot led to highly elevated methane emissions in both years.

source_spans.text: However, the anoxic soil conditions in the experimental plot led to highly elevated methane emissions in both years.

source_document.title: Assessment of an integrated peat-harvesting and reclamation method: peatland-atmosphere carbon fluxes and vegetation recovery

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:655999bbb6cb
edges.original_sentence: Our results demonstrate that the method can enable rapid re-establishment of a healthy Sphagnum mat and carbon dioxide sequestration function in harvested peatlands, although the global warming potential of our experimental trial was high due to elevated methane emissions.

source_spans.text: Our results demonstrate that the method can enable rapid re-establishment of a healthy Sphagnum mat and carbon dioxide sequestration function in harvested peatlands, although the global warming potential of our experimental trial was high due to elevated methane emissions.

source_document.title: Assessment of an integrated peat-harvesting and reclamation method: peatland-atmosphere carbon fluxes and vegetation recovery

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:e2090ce6ba80
edges.original_sentence: We suspected that ﬂoating the reclaimed peat blocks into a ﬂooded extraction pit would provide a stable soil hydrological regime in the reclaimed peat, reducing water stress experienced by the transplanted vegetation mat.

source_spans.text: We suspected that ﬂoating the reclaimed peat blocks into a ﬂooded extraction pit would provide a stable soil hydrological regime in the reclaimed peat, reducing water stress experienced by the transplanted vegetation mat.
